data.title: onboarding SKILL.md: no test assertion for timeout 120 in Phase 9 Semgrep install block
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: No test validates that 'timeout 120' is present in the Phase 9 Semgrep installation code block. The existing test-onboarding-semgrep.sh tests check only that Semgrep installation guidance exists, not that the timeout guard is applied. The new 'Never block progress if installation fails or times out' bullet is verified indirectly by test_optional_deps_non_blocking, but the Phase 9 timeout wrapping itself has no dedicated assertion.
File: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
Category: verification
